title: Who The F Is Madeleine
description: 'Who the F*$% is Madeleine?' Not only Lily Allen's hit song, but the question Madeleine has grappled with through years of living abroad, navigating Irish and French culture, and messing up her romantic life fantastically. This is Madeleine's recount of misadventures to a soap opera degree of tea, and a love letter to the gays and girlies, for their supportive voice notes, loud karaoke sessions, and endless gig pig behaviour at live music events, showing her time and time again where the healthy love is. Madeleine Munford is a stand-up comedian and actress originally from New York, who is currently based in London, England. Known for her honest storytelling, with as sharp as a whip comedic timing and a dry wit, Madeleine is a rising star on the London comedy scene. Before her relocation, Madeleine performed as the resident MC and producer for Icarus Comedy Club and Friday Night Live. Madeleine has performed as the support act for David McSavage and Bobcat Goldthwait.
content_warnings: Stories with references of a sexual nature may be included

venue.name: Laughing Horse @ a&o Hostel bar (Front Room)
